use.flag: Pull in dev-util/git-delta for syntax-highlighted diff display (referenced by the default config)

pkgmetadata.longdescription: lazyworktree is a terminal user interface (TUI) for managing git worktrees. It can create, list, switch, rename, and delete worktrees, integrates with lazygit and git-delta, and ships shell helper functions for bash, zsh, and fish.
